name: wallet-profiler
description: Comprehensive on-chain wallet profiler with 4 pricing tiers. Free: balance + risk. Basic: + tokens + spam detection. Standard: + USD prices + DeFi + NFTs + sanctions + smart money + MEV detection. Premium: + natural language summary. Supports 7 chains: Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche, BNB. Additional endpoints: token holder analysis, portfolio history, wallet comparison, social identity, reputation badges, and agent referral program.

address.description: Wallet address (0x...) or ENS name (e.g. vitalik.eth). Comma-separated for batch.

tier.description: Service tier: free (0 ETH), basic (0.0005 ETH), standard (0.001 ETH), premium (0.003 ETH). Defaults to standard.
